Rhombus R200 5MP Dome Security Camera with Onboard Storage of 128GB or 20 Days

The Rhombus R200 Network Surveillance Camera delivers simple and dependable, enterprise-grade security in a mini-dome form factor. Powered by a quad-core processor, the R200 features full HD recording, up to 180 days of on-camera storage and advanced edge processing for smarter object recognition. Built for versatility, the R200 comes standard with infrared night vision and a weatherproof design perfect for any environment.
